{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ 'Edit Vendor' if vendor else 'Add Vendor' }}{% endblock %} {% block page_title %}{{ 'Edit Vendor' if vendor else 'Add Vendor' }}{% endblock %} {% block content %} {% from "macros.html" import render_field, render_flash_messages %} {{ render_flash_messages() }}
{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ render_field(form.code) }} {{ render_field(form.name) }}
{{ render_field(form.contact_person) }} {{ render_field(form.phone) }}
{{ render_field(form.email) }} {{ render_field(form.tin) }}
{{ render_field(form.payment_terms) }}
{{ render_field(form.address) }}
{{ form.check_payee_name(class="form-control") }} Name to be printed on checks (if different from vendor name)
{{ render_field(form.postal_code) }}
{{ render_field(form.default_vat_category) }}
{{ form.wt_wc010(id=form.wt_wc010.id) }}
{{ form.wt_wc011(id=form.wt_wc011.id) }}
{{ form.wt_wc100(id=form.wt_wc100.id) }}
{{ form.wt_wc158(id=form.wt_wc158.id) }}
Cancel
{% endblock %}
